# GetDocSlots

> Simple room scheduling for medical offices that rent consulting rooms to independent providers.

## What is GetDocSlots?

GetDocSlots is a done-for-you scheduling system built for medical and wellness offices that rent consulting rooms to independent practitioners (psychologists, therapists, psychiatrists, physical therapists, nutritionists, etc.).

It replaces spreadsheets, WhatsApp groups, and generic scheduling tools with a purpose-built real-time dashboard.

## Key Features

- **Visual weekly calendar**: See all rooms side-by-side, color-coded by provider. Monday–Saturday scheduling with 55-minute slots.
- **Real-time updates**: Slot availability checked in real-time. No double bookings.
- **Billing reports**: Automatic per-provider billing based on room usage. Late cancellation tracking. PDF export.
- **Room management**: Add/edit rooms, set custom hourly rates, block rooms for maintenance.
- **Role-based access**: Admin sees everything. Front desk manages bookings and billing. Providers see only their own appointments.
- **Email notifications**: Automated emails for bookings, cancellations, and welcome messages.

## Pricing

- $799 one-time setup fee
- $350/month flat rate (up to 20 providers)
- No per-seat pricing

## What's Included

- Custom domain and branding
- Full onboarding and training
- Email notifications
- Ongoing support
- CRM/ERP integration (standard connections)
- Continuous updates

## Tech Stack

Built on Next.js, Convex (real-time backend), and Vercel. Enterprise-grade infrastructure with encrypted connections, role-based access control, and isolated databases per client.
